name: International Business Machines Corporation
description: International Business Machines Corporation (IBM) is a global technology and consulting company headquartered in Armonk, New York. It is a leading provider of hybrid cloud and artificial intelligence solutions, offering a comprehensive portfolio of software, hardware, and services. IBM's expertise spans across data analytics, quantum computing, cybersecurity, and enterprise automation, helping clients navigate digital transformation. With a legacy of innovation, the company focuses on delivering high-value technology solutions to businesses and governments worldwide, leveraging its Watson AI platform and extensive consulting capabilities to drive productivity and competitive advantage in the modern digital economy.
